description: Validator for the branch_variable callflow data object

id.description: if using the doc scope, a doc id is required

scope.description: specifies where the variable is defined

skip_module.description: When set to true this callflow action is skipped, advancing to the wildcard branch (if any)

variable.description: specifies the name or path to the variable that should be looked up

oneOf.description: specifies the name of variable/property that should be looked up
specifies a json path to the variable/property that should be looked up
